title: Structure definition
description: TICKET-P5-BD-06. Mirrors schema.unit.json's shape for placeable structures. CLAUDE.md forbids hand-editing stats in code, so these files are the catalogue and World's compiled defaults exist only to be proved equal to them by the selftest round-trip.

name.description: Player-facing name. British spelling. Must pass legal sweep.

faction.description: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY at present, unlike the unit schema's faction key. The sim gates exactly one structure by faction (the veil projector, World.cs BuildStructure) and StructureTypeDef carries no Faction field; wiring the rest is a behaviour change and belongs to a sim ticket, not to this file.

build_time_ticks.description: Sim ticks at 15Hz. 0 is load-bearing and means 'never queued at a Construction Yard': the yard refuses it (BuildTicks <= 0). The MCV-deployed yard and the upfront-cost barrier both rely on this.

sight_range.description: Cells. 0 is load-bearing for barriers: FogSystem skips zero-sight entities.

footprint.description: Cells per side of the square footprint (ADR-005). Barriers are 1; everything else is 2. A mismatch against the placement code is silent and fatal.

weapon_ids.description: First entry arms the structure; empty is unarmed.

prerequisites.description: Structure ids required before this may be queued. Parsed and carried on the def; ENFORCEMENT is TICKET-P5-BD-17, which is a sim change.
